data.title: 国际服活动「Special Mission DECAGRAMMATON」3
data.summary: [Event Update Notice] Under pressure from the Decagrammaton, Eimi and Himari set up a new Super Phen
data.body:
[Event Update Notice]

Under pressure from the Decagrammaton, Eimi and Himari set up a new Super Phenomenon Task Force office!
Join their search as they journey to Abydos!

🗓️Event Period: After 2/14(Tue) Maintenance – 2/28(Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
